title: cuphea nudicostata
intro: Cuphea nudicostata, also known as the hairy cuphea or yellow bells, is a flowering plant species in the family Lythraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cuphea nudicostata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
